Definition at line 1144 of file GenIC.c.

1149{
1150 char buffer[400];
1151
1152 sprintf(buffer, "seedplane_partial_%d", ThisTask);
1153 dprintf(VDIAG, ThisTask, "\t\tTask %d writing seedplane: %d, %d -> %d, %d\n", ThisTask,
1154 bottom_left[_x_], bottom_left[_y_], top_right[_x_], top_right[_y_]);
1155
1156
1157 for(int tt = 0; tt < NTasks; tt++)
1158 {
1159 if( ThisTask == tt)
1160 {
1161 if( z0 == 0)
1162 // write data only if this task owes the z = 0 plane
1163 // this avoids to write the same portion of plane multiple times
1164 {
1165 FILE *file = fopen(buffer, "w");
1166 int k, offset;
1167
1168 if(internal.large_plane == 0)
1169 {
1170 k = bottom_left[_y_] * Nmesh + bottom_left[_x_];
1171 offset = Nmesh - n_x;
1172 }
1173 else
1174 k = offset = 0;
1175
1176
1177 for(int jj = bottom_left[_y_]; jj < top_right[_y_]; jj++)
1178 {
1179 if( internal.dump_seedplane == 1 )
1180 // write the plane in its "natural order"
1181 {
1182 unsigned int line = jj*Nmesh;
1183 for(int ii = bottom_left[_x_]; ii < top_right[_x_]; ii++)
1184 fprintf(file, "%d %d %d %u\n", ii, jj, line + ii, SEEDTABLE[k++]);
1185 }
1186 else
1187 // write the plane in its transposed order
1188 {
1189 for(int ii = bottom_left[_x_]; ii < top_right[_x_]; ii++)
1190 fprintf(file, "%d %d %d %u\n", jj, ii, ii*Nmesh + jj, SEEDTABLE[k++]);
1191 }
1192 k += offset;
1193 }
1194
1195 fclose(file);
1196 }
1197 else
1198 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "\t\t\tTask %d skips because z0 == %d\n", ThisTask, z0);
1199 }
1200 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
1201 }
1202
1203 if(ThisTask == 0)
1204 {
1205 int err;
1206 char filename[200];
1207 sprintf(filename, "seed_plane.Ng_%d_Nt_%d.dat", Nmesh, NTasks);
1208 sprintf(buffer, "cat seedplane_partial_* | sort -k3 -n > %s", filename);
1209
1210 err = system(buffer);
1211 if(err != 0)
1212 dprintf(VXX, 0, "something went wrong while writing %s file\n", filename);
1213
1214 err = system("rm -f seedplane_partial_*");
1215 if(err != 0)
1216 dprintf(VXX, 0, "something went wrong while removing temporary files seedplane_partial_*\n");
1217 }
1218
1219 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
1220
1221 return;
1222}

◆ generate_seeds_plane()

int generate_seeds_plane ( int  ThisGrid,
map_point  bottom_left,
map_point  top_right,
unsigned  Nmesh,
int  k0symmetries 
)

Definition at line 482 of file GenIC.c.

483{
484
485 /* ---------------------------------------
486 *
487 * STEP 1
488 *
489 * generate old seed table if requested
490 --------------------------------------- */
491
492
493 if(internal.mimic_original_seedtable)
494 {
495
496 OLDSEEDTABLE = (unsigned int*) calloc( GRID.GSglobal[_x_] * GRID.GSglobal[_y_], sizeof(unsigned int));
497
498 if( !internal.large_plane )
499 SEEDTABLE = OLDSEEDTABLE;
500
501 gsl_rng_set(random_generator, params.RandomSeed);
502
503 for(int i = 0; i < Nmesh / 2; i++)
504 {
505 // proceed inwards from the 4 corners
506
507 // 0, 0
508 for(int j = 0; j < i ; j++)
509 OLDSEEDTABLE[j * Nmesh + i] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
510
511 for(int j = 0; j < i + 1; j++)
512 OLDSEEDTABLE[i * Nmesh + j] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
513
514 // Nmesh, 0
515 for(int j = 0; j < i; j++)
516 OLDSEEDTABLE[j * Nmesh + (Nmesh - 1 - i)] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
517
518 for(int j = 0; j < i + 1; j++)
519 OLDSEEDTABLE[i * Nmesh + (Nmesh - 1 - j)] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
520
521
522 // 0, Nmesh
523 for(int j = 0; j < i; j++)
524 OLDSEEDTABLE[(Nmesh - 1 - j) * Nmesh + i] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
525
526 for(int j = 0; j < i + 1; j++)
527 OLDSEEDTABLE[(Nmesh - 1 - i) * Nmesh + j] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
528
529
530 // Nmesh, Nmesh
531 for(int j = 0; j < i; j++)
532 OLDSEEDTABLE[(Nmesh - 1 - j) * Nmesh + (Nmesh - 1 - i)] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
533
534 for(int j = 0; j < i + 1; j++)
535 OLDSEEDTABLE[(Nmesh - 1 - i) * Nmesh + (Nmesh - 1 - j)] = 0x7fffffff * gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
536
537 }
538
539 }
540
541 if( (!internal.large_plane) && internal.mimic_original_seedtable )
542 return 0;
543
544
545 /* ---------------------------------------
546 *
547 * STEP 2
548 *
549 * continue if either a large plane is
550 * requested or the new seed table is to
551 * be generated
552 --------------------------------------- */
553
554
555 int N_subregions;
556 map_index error;
557 map_point subregions[4][2] = { {{0, 0}, {0, 0}}, {{0, 0}, {0, 0}} };
558 uint subregions_offsets[4] = {0 ,0, 0, 0}, subregions_starts[4] = {0, 0, 0, 0};
559
560
561 // individuate the sub-regions of this task's domain to map them onto spiral-plane
562
563 N_subregions = get_plane_subregions(Nmesh, bottom_left, top_right, subregions, subregions_offsets, subregions_starts);
564 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "Task %d: subregions done\n", ThisTask); fflush(stdout);
565
566
567 // show some infos
568
569 if(internal.verbose_level > VDBG)
570 for(int T = 0; T < NTasks; T++)
571 {
572 if( ThisTask == T )
573 for(int i = 0; i < N_subregions; i++)
574 {
575 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "\ttask: %3d\n"
576 "\t\tReg %d: bottom left : %d, %d\n"""
577 "\t\tReg %d: top right : %d, %d\n"
578 "\t\tReg %d: st/off: %u, %u\n ", ThisTask,
579 i, subregions[i][BL][0], subregions[i][BL][1], i, subregions[i][TR][0], subregions[i][TR][1],
580 i, subregions_starts[i], subregions_offsets[i]);
581 }
582
583 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
584 }
585
586
587 /* ---------------------------------------
588 *
589 * STEP 3
590 *
591 * either copy old seeds or generate seeds
592 * accordingly to spiral order in each
593 * subregion
594 * --------------------------------------- */
595
596 {
597 uint ystride, *start_pointer;
598 map_index Npoints;
599
600
601 // calculate the total length of the whole region along y
602 ystride = subregions[N_subregions-1][TR][_y_] - subregions[0][BL][_y_];
603
604 // calculate how many points will be generated
605 Npoints = ystride * (subregions[N_subregions-1][TR][_x_] - subregions[0][BL][_x_]);
606
607 // allocate memory for all the seeds
608
609 if( ( SEEDTABLE = calloc( sizeof(uint), (size_t)Npoints) ) == NULL )
610 {
611 dprintf(VXERR, ThisTask, "Unable to allocate %lld bytes\n", Npoints * sizeof(uint));
612 return 1;
613 }
614
615 if( internal.mimic_original_seedtable )
616 // copy same region from the old seed plane in the right place
617
618 for(int i = 0; i < N_subregions; i++)
619 {
620 start_pointer = &(SEEDTABLE[subregions_starts[i]]);
621 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "\t\t ccc task %d copying seed in region %d "
622 ":: (%d, %d) -> (%d, %d) starting at %u, offset %u\n",
623 ThisTask, i, subregions[i][BOTTOM][_x_], subregions[i][BOTTOM][_y_],
624 subregions[i][TOP][_x_], subregions[i][TOP][_y_], subregions_starts[i], subregions_offsets[i]);
625
626 copy_seeds_subregion(subregions[i][BOTTOM], subregions[i][TOP], start_pointer, Nmesh, subregions_offsets[i]);
627 }
628 else
629 for( int i = 0; i < N_subregions; i++ )
630 {
631
632 map_point transposed_subregion[2];
633
634 transposed_subregion[BOTTOM][_x_] = subregions[i][BOTTOM][_x_];
635 transposed_subregion[BOTTOM][_y_] = subregions[i][BOTTOM][_y_];
636 transposed_subregion[TOP][_x_] = subregions[i][TOP][_x_];
637 transposed_subregion[TOP][_y_] = subregions[i][TOP][_y_];
638
639 // transpose subregion in spiral's coordinates
640 transpose_subregion(0, Nmesh, &transposed_subregion[0], &transposed_subregion[1]);
641
642 start_pointer = &SEEDTABLE[subregions_starts[i]];
643
644 // generate the seeds and put them in memory at the right place
645 generate_seeds_subregion(transposed_subregion[0], transposed_subregion[1],
646 params.RandomSeed, &start_pointer, subregions_offsets[i], &error);
647 }
648
649 }
650
651 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "Task %d: seeds generated\n", ThisTask); fflush(stdout);
652
653
654
655/* ---------------------------------------
656 *
657 * STEP 4
658 *
659 * if a large plane is used AND this
660 * task's domain include k=0 symmetries
661 * populate buffers to fullfill those
662 * symmetries
663 * --------------------------------------- */
664
665
666 if(internal.large_plane && k0symmetries)
667 {
668
669 // now check for additional symmetries on plane k = 0:
670 //
671 // - quadrant 1 and 3 just pick seeds from regions in
672 // quadrants 2 and 0 respectively, symmetrical with
673 // respect to the centre (Nmesh/2, Nmesh/2)
674 // - row x=0 in quadrant 1 picks seed from row x=0
675 // in quadrant 0 (symmetrically to y=Nmesh/2)
676 // - column y=0 in quadrant 2 picks seeds from column y=0
677 // in quadrant 0 (symmetrically to x=Nmesh/2)
678 //
679 // ^
680 // Q 2 | Q 3
681 // |
682 // ------------------>
683 // |
684 // Q 0 | Q 1
685 //
686 //
687
688 map_point SBL, STR; // Symmetric Bottom-Left, Top-Right
689 unsigned int Np;
690
691
692 for(int i = 0; i < N_subregions; i++)
693 {
694 int Q = quadrant(subregions[i][0], Nmesh/2);
695 int SEED_k0_index = Q / 2;
696
697 if(Q > 0)
698 {
699 switch(Q)
700 {
701
702 case(1): // row y = 0 and/or plane symmetry
703
704 if(subregions[i][BOTTOM][_y_] == 0)
705 // this subregion in quadrant 1 contains the stripe y = 0
706 {
707 // set-up corners for seed sub-region generation
708 SBL[_y_] = 0, SBL[_x_] = Nmesh - subregions[i][TOP][_x_];// + 1;
709 STR[_y_] = 1, STR[_x_] = Nmesh - subregions[i][BOTTOM][_x_] + 1;
710
711 // find horizontal extension in this quadrant
712 Np = STR[_x_] - SBL[_x_];
713
714 // allocate memory for seeds in this stripe
715 SEED_y0 = (unsigned int*)malloc(sizeof(unsigned int) * Np);
716
717 if(!internal.mimic_original_seedtable)
718 {
719 // transpose subregion in spiral's coordinates
720 transpose_subregion(0, Nmesh, &SBL, &STR);
721
722 generate_seeds_subregion(SBL, STR, params.RandomSeed, &SEED_y0, 0, 0);
723 }
724 else
725 copy_seeds_subregion(SBL, STR, SEED_y0, Nmesh, 0);
726
727 }
728
729 // NOTE ---> the previous lines dealed with the y=0 border of Q1;
730 // now continue with the operations for plane symmetry.
731 // Since they are the the same than for the plane symmetry
732 // in case(3), we simply avoid the usual break and let it
733 // continue below with the code for case(3)
734
735 case(3): // plane symmetry
736
737 // set-up corners for seed sub-region generation
738 SBL[_x_] = subregions[i][BOTTOM][_x_], SBL[_y_] = subregions[i][BOTTOM][_y_];
739 STR[_x_] = subregions[i][TOP ][_x_], STR[_y_] = subregions[i][TOP ][_y_];
740
741 // take the symmetrical region
742 symmetry(&SBL, &STR, Nmesh);
743 SEED_k0_BL[SEED_k0_index][_x_] = STR[_x_], SEED_k0_BL[SEED_k0_index][_y_] = STR[_y_];
744 SEED_k0_nx[SEED_k0_index] = SBL[_x_] - STR[_x_];
745 SEED_k0_ny[SEED_k0_index] = SBL[_y_] - STR[_y_];
746
747 // transpose into spiral-plane region;
748 // note that taking the symmetrical with respect to the centre
749 // the bottom-left and top-right corners are swapped
750 if(!internal.mimic_original_seedtable)
751 transpose_subregion(0, Nmesh, &STR, &SBL);
752
753 // calculate how many points are in region
754 Np = (SBL[_x_] - STR[_x_]) * (SBL[_y_] - STR[_y_]);
755
756 // allocate memory
757 SEED_k0[SEED_k0_index] = (unsigned int*)malloc(sizeof(unsigned int) * Np);
758
759 if(internal.mimic_original_seedtable)
760 copy_seeds_subregion(STR, SBL, SEED_k0[SEED_k0_index], Nmesh, 0);
761 else
762 // generate appropriate seeds
763 generate_seeds_subregion(STR, SBL, params.RandomSeed, &SEED_k0[SEED_k0_index], 0, 0);
764
765 break;
766
767 case(2): // column x = 0
768 if(subregions[i][BOTTOM][_x_] == 0)
769 {
770
771 // set-up corners for seed sub-region generation
772 SBL[_x_] = 0, SBL[_y_] = Nmesh - subregions[i][TOP][_y_];
773 STR[_x_] = 1, STR[_y_] = Nmesh - subregions[i][BOTTOM][_y_] + 1;
774
775 // find vertical extension in this quadrant
776 Np = STR[_y_] - SBL[_y_];
777
778 // allocate memory for seeds in this stripe
779 SEED_x0 = (unsigned int*)malloc(sizeof(unsigned int) * Np);
780
781 if(!internal.mimic_original_seedtable)
782 {
783 // transpose subregion in spiral's coordinates
784 transpose_subregion(0, Nmesh, &SBL, &STR);
785
786 generate_seeds_subregion(SBL, STR, params.RandomSeed, &SEED_x0, 0, 0);
787 }
788 else
789 copy_seeds_subregion(SBL, STR, SEED_x0, Nmesh, 0);
790
791 }
792 break;
793
794
795 } // ends switch(Q)
796
797 } // ends if (Q > 0)
798
799 } // ends subregions loop
800
801 } // ends k0symmetries
802
803
804 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "Task %d: symmetries generated\n", ThisTask); fflush(stdout);
805
806 return 0;
807}
quadrant

◆ generate_seeds_subregion()

int generate_seeds_subregion ( map_point  bottom_left,
map_point  top_right,
uint  seed,
uint **  seed_plane,
uint  offset,
map_index *  value 
)

Definition at line 875 of file GenIC.c.

886{
887 map_index N, rnd_counter, Ncnt;
888 map_point p;
889 uint xlength, ylength;
890 uint *idxs;
891
892 // calculate the region's dimensions
893 xlength = top_right[_x_] - bottom_left[_x_];
894 ylength = top_right[_y_] - bottom_left[_y_];
895 N = xlength * ylength;
896
897 // Allocate actual memory for the random seeds.
898 // The difference with map is that we do not need to store 8-bytes
899 // integers, while we needed it to store in the map array the
900 // spiral ordered points
901 if(*seed_plane == NULL)
902 {
903 if((*seed_plane = calloc( (size_t)N, sizeof(uint) )) == NULL)
904 {
905 if(value != NULL)
906 *value = N * sizeof(uint);
907 return 3;
908 }
909 offset = 0;
910 }
911
912 // allocate temporary memory for the random seeds
913 if((map = calloc( (size_t)N, sizeof(map_index) )) == NULL)
914 {
915 if(value != NULL)
916 *value = N * sizeof(map_index);
917 return 1;
918 }
919
920 // allocate temporary memory for the indexes that will be used to
921 // sort the points along the spiral
922 if((idxs = calloc( (size_t)N, sizeof(uint) )) == NULL)
923 {
924 if(value != NULL)
925 *value = N * sizeof(uint);
926 return 2;
927 }
928
929
930 // initialize indexes
931 // for the following loop check whether:
932 // - leave unroll to the compiler
933 // - or explicitly use simd instruction
934 for(int i = 0; i < N; i++)
935 idxs[i] = i;
936
937 // get the map value from spiral for each point in the region
938 for(int j = 0; j < ylength; j++)
939 {
940 p[_y_] = bottom_left[_y_]+j;
941
942 int j_offset = j*xlength;
943 for(int i = 0; i < xlength; i++)
944 {
945 p[_x_] = bottom_left[_x_]+i;
946 map[j_offset + i] = get_map(p);
947 }
948 }
949
950 // index-sort the map
951 qsort(idxs, (size_t)N, sizeof(uint), cmp_map_points);
952
953 // generate random numbers following the spiral traversal order
954
955 // set the random number generator
956 gsl_rng *R;
957
958 R = gsl_rng_alloc(gsl_rng_mt19937);
959 gsl_rng_set(R, seed);
960
961 // actually generates pseudo-random number
962 rnd_counter = 0;
963 Ncnt = 0;
964 for(int i = 0; i < N; i++)
965 {
966 if(rnd_counter < map[idxs[i]]-1)
967 for(; rnd_counter < map[idxs[i]]-1; rnd_counter++)
968 gsl_rng_get(R);
969
970 map[idxs[i]] = (map_index)gsl_rng_get(R);
971 Ncnt++;
972 rnd_counter++;
973 }
974
975 gsl_rng_free(R); // releases generator
976
977 free(idxs); // releases indexes
978
979 //copy the seeds from map into seed_plane, as uint instead of as long long
980 for(uint k = 0, j = 0; j < N; j++)
981 {
982 if((k > 0) && (j % xlength == 0))
983 k += offset;
984 (*seed_plane)[k++] = (uint)map[j];
985 }
986
987 free(map);
988 map = 0x0;
989 return 0;
990}
cmp_map_points
int cmp_map_points(const void *, const void *)
Definition GenIC.c:861
get_map
map_index get_map(map_point)
Definition GenIC.c:840

References _x_, _y_, cmp_map_points(), get_map(), and map.

Referenced by generate_seeds_plane().

Here is the call graph for this function:
Here is the caller graph for this function:

◆ GenIC_large()

int GenIC_large ( int  ThisGrid)

Definition at line 73 of file GenIC.c.

74{
75 int Nmesh, Nsample, VectorLength;
76 int C[3], local_n[3], local_start[3];
77 double Box, fac;
78
79 VectorLength = GRID.total_local_size_fft;
80 Nmesh = GRID.GSglobal[_x_];
81 Nsample = GRID.GSglobal[_x_];
82 Box = GRID.BoxSize;
83
84 fac = pow(1./Box,1.5);
85
86
87 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "==== %d in k-space:: (%td, %td) - (%td, %td) - (%td, %td)\n",
88 ThisTask,
89 GRID.GSstart_k[0], GRID.GSstart_k[0] + GRID.GSlocal_k[0],
90 GRID.GSstart_k[1], GRID.GSstart_k[1] + GRID.GSlocal_k[1],
91 GRID.GSstart_k[2], GRID.GSstart_k[2] + GRID.GSlocal_k[2]);
92
93
94 // -----------------------------------------------
95 // generate seed plane
96 // bottom-left and top-right corners for the region of k-plane
97 // that this Task must deal with
98
99
100 // prepare coordinates
101 if ( !params.use_transposed_fft )
102 // this is the non-transposed order x, y, z
103 for(int i = 0; i < 3; i++)
104 C[i] = i;
105 else
106 {
107 if ( internal.tasks_subdivision_dim > 1 )
108 C[0] = _y_, C[1] = _z_, C[2] = _x_;
109 else
110 C[0] = _y_, C[1] = _x_, C[2] = _z_;
111 }
112
113 // set up starting points and lenghts
114 for(int i = 0; i< 3; i++)
115 {
116 local_n [i] = GRID.GSlocal_k[i];
117 local_start[i] = GRID.GSstart_k[i];
118 }
119
120 // actually generate seeds
121 {
122 map_point bottom_left, top_right;
123 map_point plane_bottom_left, plane_top_right;
124
125 bottom_left[_x_] = GRID.GSstart_k[_x_];
126 bottom_left[_y_] = GRID.GSstart_k[_y_];
127
128 top_right[_x_] = GRID.GSstart_k[_x_] + GRID.GSlocal_k[_x_];
129 top_right[_y_] = GRID.GSstart_k[_y_] + GRID.GSlocal_k[_y_];
130
131 if( !internal.large_plane )
132 {
133 plane_bottom_left[_x_] = 0;
134 plane_bottom_left[_y_] = 0;
135
136 plane_top_right[_x_] = Nmesh;
137 plane_top_right[_y_] = Nmesh;
138 }
139 else
140 {
141 plane_bottom_left[_x_] = bottom_left[_x_];
142 plane_bottom_left[_y_] = bottom_left[_y_];
143 plane_top_right[_x_] = top_right[_x_];
144 plane_top_right[_y_] = top_right[_y_];
145 }
146
147 int ret = generate_seeds_plane(ThisGrid, plane_bottom_left, plane_top_right, Nmesh, (local_start[_z_] == 0));
148
149 if( ret > 0 )
150 return ret;
151
152 if ( internal.dump_seedplane )
153 {
154
155 if ( params.use_transposed_fft && internal.tasks_subdivision_dim > 1 )
156 C[1] = _x_;
157 dump_seed_plane(ThisGrid, bottom_left, top_right, C, local_n[_x_], GRID.GSstart_k[_z_], Nmesh);
158 }
159 }
160
161 // -----------------------------------------------
162
163
164
165
166 // the vector is initialized to zero
167 memset( kdensity[ThisGrid], 0, VectorLength * sizeof(double) );
168
169 int Nmesh_2, Nmesh_odd;
170 gsl_rng *k0_generator;
171
172 Nmesh_2 = Nmesh / 2;
173 Nmesh_odd = (Nmesh % 2);
174
175
176 // initialize the pseudo-random number chain
177
178 gsl_rng_set(random_generator, params.RandomSeed);
179
180 // initialize a second random generator, used on the plane k = 0
181
182 k0_generator = gsl_rng_alloc(gsl_rng_ranlxd1);
183
184 // --------------------------------------------------------------
185 // this is the main loop on grid modes
186 //--------------------------------------------------------------
187
188 for( int i = 0; i < local_n[_x_]; i++ )
189 {
190
191 // ii is the x grid coordinate
192 int ii = local_start[_x_] + i;
193 if ( ii == Nmesh_2 )
194 continue;
195
196 double kvec[3];
197
198 if ( ii < Nmesh_2 )
199 kvec[0] = ii * 2 * PI / Box;
200 else
201 kvec[0] = -(Nmesh - ii) * 2 * PI / Box;
202
203 double kmag2_i = kvec[0] * kvec[0];
204 int iii = ii;
205
206
207 for(int j = 0; j < local_n[_y_]; j++)
208 {
209
210 // jj is the y grid coordinate
211 int jj = local_start[_y_] + j;
212 if(jj == Nmesh_2)
213 continue;
214 int jjj = jj;
215
216 if(jj < Nmesh_2)
217 kvec[1] = jj * 2 * PI / Box;
218 else
219 kvec[1] = -(Nmesh - jj) * 2 * PI / Box;
220
221 double kmag2_ij = kmag2_i + kvec[1] * kvec[1];
222
223 unsigned int seed;
224
225 // initialize the random generator with the seed found in the
226 // seedtable at the (i,j) coordinate in grid coordinates
227 if(internal.large_plane)
228 {
229 gsl_rng_set(random_generator, SEEDTABLE[j * local_n[_x_] + i]);
230 seed = SEEDTABLE[j * local_n[_x_] + i];
231 }
232 else
233 {
234 gsl_rng_set(random_generator, SEEDTABLE[jj * Nmesh + ii]);
235 seed = SEEDTABLE[jj * Nmesh + ii];
236 }
237
238 // since the chain of random numbers is subsequent, to
239 // reproduce all the time the same sequence, this
240 // process must generate all the random numbers on the
241 // k column that are below its starting k coordinate
242
243 double phase;
244 if(local_start[_z_] > 0 && local_start[_z_] < Nmesh_2)
245 for(int RR = 0; RR < local_start[_z_]; RR++)
246 {
247 phase = gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
248 do
249 phase = gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
250 while(phase == 0);
251 }
252
253 // inner loop
254 for(int k = 0; (k < local_n[_z_]) && (k+local_start[_z_] < Nmesh_2); k++)
255 {
256 // kk is the z grid coordinate
257 int kk = local_start[_z_] + k;
258
259 // generate phase and amplitude
260 phase = gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator) * 2 * PI;
261 double ampl;
262 do
263 ampl = gsl_rng_uniform(random_generator);
264 while(ampl == 0);
265
266 // blind points on the cube
267 if(ii == 0 && jj == 0 && kk == 0)
268 continue;
269 if(kk == Nmesh_2)
270 continue;
271
272 if(kk < Nmesh_2)
273 kvec[2] = kk * 2 * PI / Box;
274 else
275 kvec[2] = -(Nmesh - kk) * 2 * PI / Box;
276
277 double kmag2_local = kmag2_ij + kvec[2] * kvec[2];
278 double kmag = sqrt(kmag2_local);
279
280 if(kmag * Box / (2 * PI) > NYQUIST * Nsample / 2)
281 continue;
282
283 double p_of_k = PowerSpectrum(kmag);
284
285 double sign = 1.0;
286 int addr_j = j;
287
288 // special symmetries on the plane k = 0
289 if( kk == 0 )
290 {
291
292 // some points are left empty
293 if( (ii == 0) && (jj == Nmesh_2 || jj == Nmesh_2 + Nmesh_odd) )
294 continue;
295 if( (ii == Nmesh_2) || (ii == Nmesh_2 + Nmesh_odd) )
296 continue;
297
298 // the half-plane for ii > Nmesh_2 takes the seeds
299 // from points in the other half-plane
300 if( ( ii > Nmesh_2 ) ||
301 ( ii == 0 && jj > Nmesh/2 ) )
302 {
303 // symmetries on j
304 jjj = Nmesh -jj;
305 if(jjj == Nmesh)
306 jjj = 0;
307
308 if(Nmesh_odd && jj == Nmesh_2+1)
309 {
310 jjj = Nmesh_2+1;
311 addr_j = Nmesh_2;
312 }
313
314 // symmetries on i
315 if(ii > Nmesh_2)
316 iii = Nmesh - ii;
317
318
319 //unsigned int seed;
320 if(internal.large_plane)
321 // each task owns only a region of the seeds' plane
322 {
323 if(jjj == 0)
324 // the line below would read
325 // seed = SEED_y0[iii];
326 // however, since SEED_y0 starts from 0 we
327 // have to displace accordingly to i position
328 // reversed because of the requested symmetry
329 {
330 seed = SEED_y0[local_n[_x_] - i];
331 }
332 else if(iii == 0)
333 // the line below would read
334 // seed = SEED_x0[jjj];
335 // however, since SEED_y0 starts from 0 we
336 // have to displace accordingly to j position
337 // reversed because of the requested symmetry
338 {
339 seed = SEED_x0[local_n[_y_] - j];
340 }
341 else
342 {
343 map_point V;
344 V[_x_] = ii;
345 V[_y_] = jj;
346 int Q = quadrant(V , Nmesh/2) / 2;
347
348 seed = SEED_k0[Q][(jjj - SEED_k0_BL[Q][_y_]) * SEED_k0_nx[Q] + (iii - SEED_k0_BL[Q][_x_]) ];
349 }
350 }
351 else
352 {
353 // each task owns the whole seeds plane
354 seed = SEEDTABLE[jjj * Nmesh + iii];
355 }
356
357
358 sign = -1.0;
359
360 // re-initialize the spare random generator to the right seed
361 gsl_rng_set(k0_generator, seed);
362 phase = gsl_rng_uniform(k0_generator) * 2 * PI;
363 do
364 ampl = gsl_rng_uniform(k0_generator);
365 while(ampl == 0);
366
367 }
368 }
369
370 // Paired initial conditions
371 if (params.PairedIC)
372 phase += PI;
373
374 // Fixed initial conditions
375 if (!params.FixedIC)
376 p_of_k *= -log(ampl);
377
378 double delta = fac * sqrt(p_of_k);
379
380 int addr;
381
382 // calculate the storing address in local coordinates
383 if(!params.use_transposed_fft)
384 addr = 2*((i * local_n[_y_] + addr_j) * local_n[_z_] + k);
385 else
386 {
387 // the addressing here is obviously awful and inefficient because
388 // when the transposed fft are used the memory ordering is
389 // row-major in z, y, x instead of x, y, z.
390 //
391 // however the nested loops have been designed for x, y, z order
392 // that is "natural" because of the z=0 symmetries.
393 //
394 // due to this fact, for the sake of a clearer coding, we prefer
395 // not to write a different version of the loops, taking into
396 // account that this part of the code is not expèected to be
397 // dominant
398
399 if(internal.tasks_subdivision_dim > 1)
400 addr = 2*((addr_j * local_n[_z_] + k) * local_n[_x_] + i);
401 else
402 addr = 2*((addr_j * local_n[_x_] + i) * local_n[_z_] + k);
403 }
404
405 kdensity[ThisGrid][addr ] = delta * cos(phase);
406 kdensity[ThisGrid][addr + 1] = sign * delta * sin(phase);
407
408 }
409
410 }
411 }
412
413 MPI_Barrier(MPI_COMM_WORLD);
414
415 gsl_rng_free(k0_generator);
416
417 if(SEED_k0[0] != NULL)
418 free(SEED_k0[0]);
419 if(SEED_k0[1] != NULL)
420 free(SEED_k0[1]);
421 if(SEED_y0 != NULL)
422 free(SEED_y0);
423 if(SEED_x0 != NULL)
424 free(SEED_x0);
425 free(SEEDTABLE);
426
427
428 /* This is needed to achieve proper normalization for pinocchio */
429
430 fac=pow((double)Nmesh, 3.0);
431 unsigned int myVectorLength = VectorLength - VectorLength % 8;
432 int i;
433 for (i = 0; i < myVectorLength; i += 8)
434 {
435 kdensity[ThisGrid][i ] *= fac;
436 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+1] *= fac;
437 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+2] *= fac;
438 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+3] *= fac;
439 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+4] *= fac;
440 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+5] *= fac;
441 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+6] *= fac;
442 kdensity[ThisGrid][i+7] *= fac;
443 }
444 for( ; i < VectorLength; i++)
445 kdensity[ThisGrid][i] *= fac;
446
447 // dump the kdensity cube on a ascii file
448 // this part shall be removed in production,
449 // or made optional
450
451 if(internal.dump_kdensity)
452 dump_cvector(kdensity[ThisGrid],
453 params.use_transposed_fft*internal.tasks_subdivision_dim,
454 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSglobal[_x_],
455 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSlocal_k,
456 MyGrids[ThisGrid].GSstart_k, "my.dkdensity", 0);
457
458
459 return 0;
460}

◆ get_map()

map_index get_map ( map_point  P)

Definition at line 840 of file GenIC.c.

842{
843 map_index l, d;
844 uint mx, my, c;
845
846 mx = abs(P[_x_]);
847 my = abs(P[_y_]);
848 l = 2 * max(mx, my);
849
850 c = (P[_y_] > P[_x_]) + (P[_x_] > 0)*(P[_x_] == P[_y_]);
851
852 d = (c) ? l * 3 + P[_x_] + P[_y_] : l - P[_x_] - P[_y_];
853
854 return (l-1)*(l-1) + d;
855}

◆ get_plane_subregions()

int get_plane_subregions ( uint  Nmesh,
map_point  bottom_left,
map_point  top_right,
map_point  Regions[4][2],
uint  Offsets[4],
uint  Starts[4] 
)

Definition at line 1068 of file GenIC.c.

1069{
1070#define NCOORDS 2
1071
1072 int c[NCOORDS] = {0, 1};
1073 uint Nmesh_2 = Nmesh/2;
1074 int Nregions = 1;
1075
1076 // copy the bottom-left and the top-right corner in the first subregion
1077 for(int i = 0; i < NCOORDS; i++)
1078 {
1079 Regions[0][BL][i] = bottom_left[i];
1080 if(bottom_left[i] > Nmesh)
1081 return -1;
1082 }
1083
1084 for(int i = 0; i < NCOORDS; i++)
1085 {
1086 Regions[0][TR][i] = top_right[i];
1087 if(top_right[i] > Nmesh)
1088 return -1;
1089 }
1090
1091 for(int i = 0; i < 4; i++)
1092 Offsets[i] = 0, Starts[i] = 0;
1093
1094
1095 // sub-divide for each coordinate if the extension
1096 // along that coordinate encompassed Nmesh/2
1097 //
1098
1099 int xlen = top_right[_x_] - bottom_left[_x_];
1100
1101 for(int k = 0; k < NCOORDS; k++)
1102 {
1103 int m = 1;
1104
1105 // cycle over all existing sub-regions
1106 for(int R = Nregions-1; R >= 0; R--)
1107
1108 // if a region overlaps N/2 along the current coordinate, we need to sub-divide
1109 if(Regions[R][BL][c[k]] < Nmesh_2 &&
1110 Regions[R][TR][c[k]] > Nmesh_2)
1111 {
1112 int j = Nregions + R;
1113
1114 for(int i = 0; i < NCOORDS; i++)
1115 Regions[j][BL][c[i]] = Regions[R][BL][c[i]];
1116 Regions[j][BL][c[k]] = Nmesh_2;
1117
1118 for(int i = 0; i < NCOORDS; i++)
1119 Regions[j][TR][c[i]] = Regions[R][TR][c[i]];
1120 Regions[R][TR][c[k]] = Nmesh_2;
1121
1122 if(k == 0)
1123 {
1124 Offsets[j] = Nmesh_2 - Regions[R][BL][c[k]];
1125 Offsets[R] = Regions[j][TR][c[k]] - Nmesh_2;
1126 }
1127 else
1128 Offsets[j] = Offsets[R];
1129
1130 Starts[j] = (Regions[j][BL][c[_y_]] - bottom_left[_y_]) * xlen +
1131 (Regions[j][BL][c[_x_]] - bottom_left[_x_]);
1132
1133 m = 2;
1134 }
1135
1136 Nregions *= m;
1137 }
1138
1139
1140 return Nregions;
1141}
NCOORDS
#define NCOORDS

)

816 // both the "+ 1 " terms below account for the upper limits being open

◆ transpose_subregion()

void transpose_subregion ( int  mode,
uint  N,
map_point *  bottom_left,
map_point *  top_right 
)

Definition at line 1017 of file GenIC.c.

1019{
1020 uint N_2 = N/2;
1021
1022 map_point copy_1 = {(*bottom_left)[0], (*bottom_left)[1]};
1023 map_point copy_2 = {(*top_right)[0], (*top_right)[1]};
1024
1025
1026
1027 if(mode == 0)
1028 // from plane to spiral
1029 {
1030 if((*bottom_left)[_x_] >= N_2)
1031 {
1032 (*bottom_left)[_x_] = (*bottom_left)[_x_] - N;
1033 (*top_right)[_x_] = (*top_right)[_x_] - N;
1034 }
1035
1036 if((*bottom_left)[_y_] >= N_2)
1037 {
1038 (*bottom_left)[_y_] = (*bottom_left)[_y_] - N;
1039 (*top_right)[_y_] = (*top_right)[_y_] - N;
1040 }
1041 }
1042 else
1043 // from spiral back to plane
1044 {
1045 if((*bottom_left)[_x_] < 0)
1046 {
1047 (*bottom_left)[_x_] = N + (*bottom_left)[_x_];
1048 (*top_right)[_x_] = N + (*top_right)[_x_];
1049 }
1050
1051 if((*bottom_left)[_y_] < 0)
1052 {
1053 (*bottom_left)[_y_] = N + (*bottom_left)[_y_];
1054 (*top_right)[_y_] = N + (*top_right)[_y_];
1055 }
1056 }
1057
1058 dprintf(VDBG, ThisTask, "\t\t Task %d: region [%d, %d] -> "
1059 "[%d, %d[ transposes into [%d, %d] -> [%d, %d[\n",
1060 ThisTask, copy_1[0], copy_1[1], copy_2[0], copy_2[1],
1061 (*bottom_left)[0], (*bottom_left)[1], (*top_right)[0], (*top_right)[1]);
1062 return;
1063}
